properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It all revolves Around Your throne Who can know Your glory? So high above Yet slain for us You alone are worthy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And the praise is Yours And the praise is Yours You're the One we bow before Reigning over us As we lift You up You will reign forevermore!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The One who was And is to come God of every moment Forever crowned Exalted now You alone are holy!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glory and praise Power and strength Worthy is the Lamb of God Hallelujah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It all revolves Around Your throne Who can know Your glory?
